actionUnits.condition: Manual trigger of HouseController.changeLights to validate emission color update on windowGlassObjects. Start() will already invoke changeLights on scene load; to cover Update path and AudioSource.switchSound.Play(), the public field 'lightStatus' must be toggled via an external UI/Event (not provided).
